endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/System.{location}/providers/{provider}/fabricLocations/{location}/computeOperationResults/{computeOperationResult}
endpoints.description: Get the status of a compute fabric operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{PROVIDER}} with a real provider. Replace {{COMPUTEOPERATIONRESULT}} with a real computeoperationresult.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/System.{location}/providers/{provider}/fabricLocations/{location}/networkOperationResults/{networkOperationResult}
endpoints.description: Get the status of a network fabric operation.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{PROVIDER}} with a real provider. Replace {{NETWORKOPERATIONRESULT}} with a real networkoperationresult.
